strategy: Low health (795), so one solid Ice hit ends it, but he keeps a -70% Tower Shield he replaces whenever damaged.
Strip the shield with a manipulation spell like Steal Ward (that removes it without the replace), then hit with Ice (+20%, resists Fire 40%).
Or just hit hard enough with Ice to punch through the -70% shield in one blow.
Expect a Star attack (about 75, occasionally 600) to all wizards every second round, so keep healed. Note wards on you can trigger him to strip all wards when his Star hits.
cheatNotes: He shields with a -70% Tower Shield on Round 1; either strip it or hit hard enough to break through.
Damaging him makes him replace the Tower Shield, so a chip hit just resets it; use one big hit or remove it first.
Manipulation spells like Steal Ward take the shield off without triggering the replace.
Hitting him with an all-enemies spell gets you a -60% Black Mantle, so single-target may be safer.
Every second round he hits the whole team with a Star spell (about 75 damage), so keep healed.
That Star spell occasionally hits for 600 instead of 75, so keep a buffer of health.
After the minions die he casts the Star attack every round, and twice on every fourth round.
If a wizard hit by the Star has any wards, he strips all wards from that wizard and himself, so do not over-shield.
